form.formComment: Comes off a 50 day let-up. Last start 4th of 7 at Oaklawn Park on February 20 over 1207m, 5 len behind Goodasiwonswas with 53.5kg at $9.10. The start before that settled back and ran on when 5th of 8 at Oaklawn Park on December 26 over 1207m, 8 len behind Raymond carrying 54kg at $5. Few opponents and worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming second last in a small field at this track on March 15 over 1408m, neck behind Three Little Birds with 57kg at $1.50. form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after nine months 6th of 9 at this track on February 28 over 1609m, 13 len behind Donegal Surges carrying 55kg at $14.98. Previously second-up 2nd of 7 at this track on April 4 2025 over 1609m, 0.5 len behind Star Of Wonder with 53kg at $23.20. Among the top chances.
